strengths: 20 years of software engineering experience across diverse technical domains (web, mobile, embedded, infrastructure) demonstrates substantial technical depth
Entrepreneurial track record evidenced by founding GISCollective (active since 2016) and multiple staff-level engineering roles in startups shows technical leadership
Recent exposure to AI infrastructure and agentic workflows through MCP framework development at re:cinq aligns with current AI platform trends
concerns: No demonstrated products or platforms built with AI despite this being a key preferred qualification for the role
AI expertise is very recent and limited in scope; lacks advanced degree (Master's/PhD) in AI-related field required for strategic AI advisory work
Unexplained 8-month career gap (October 2025 to present) with no context provided in resume

key_factors.factor: Lack of demonstrated AI products or recognized AI expertise
No advanced degree in AI-related field

response.justification: Candidate substantially exceeds the 15-year experience minimum and demonstrates solid engineering leadership through staff-level roles and entrepreneurial ventures. However, the position requires recognized AI expertise and demonstrated AI-powered products—qualifications this candidate lacks. While recent MCP framework work is promising, it is insufficient to establish the strategic depth needed for a director-level principal engineer role focused on AI strategy. The absence of an advanced AI degree and unexplained career gap further reduce fit for this specialized leadership position.
